transcript.text:
I'm here for dinner
Thank you
[Pork belly flower]
That's so cool
[Clocked out early because she's hungry]
Hello everyone
I'm here at work, but I got out earlier to eat an early dinner
I haven't decided what to eat yet
I will look around
Boiled pork
Next time
Beef intestines Sounds good
[Everything looks good]
What should I eat?
Pork belly
This is the place I to-go'd from for my last pork belly mukbang

It's really delicious
Should I eat here?
[Isu Pork Belly]
Hello everyone
You enjoyed the kimchi, right? Yes!
The one you gave me last time
Yes I saw it
Can I film here today? Yes
I was watching you eat
Did you see it on YouTube?
How are you so good at eating?
I don't understand
Everything looks so good What should I order?
2 orders of thinly sliced pork belly,
2 orders of regular pork belly,
[Writing it down]

2 orders of shoulder, 2 orders of brisket,
2 orders of cheek meat, 2 orders of pork jowl (head), 2 orders of neck meat
Thank you
We tried to put everything
[Explaining which one's which]
Thank you
[Brisket too]
This is a lot of food Amazing
I asked them to fit everything in 1 plate
[Kimchi as well]
Let's start with the thinly sliced pork belly
Looks good
I'm hungry
Put the kimchi too
Dine-in is the best for KBBQ
It's the best

[Won't allow any breaks]
Wrap the green onion kimchi with meat
Roll it
The big scallions really go well
It's easy to wrap
I already finished the thinly sliced pork belly
What to grill next?
Let's do brisket
It's one of the meats you need to grill first
Cooking brisket
I've never had their brisket before Let's try it
With the brisket sauce
[Tasty]
It smells different
The fat part is very chewy
Brisket is really good

[Cooking really fast]
It's really delicious
I knew it was going to be good
Take the kimchi
Grab a few
Dip
Kimchi
Wrap it with kimchi
It's better than the thinly sliced pork belly
Pork jowl (head)
It's a very interesting meat
It looks like the shoulder/neck meat
About this much Just a little
Hurry and cook
That looks ready
Pork jowl has a great texture

I really love the texture
That stain won't go away
Pork belly this time
Let's cook pork jowl and shoulder at the same time
How did they know that I love the fat part?
Let's sprinkle some black pepper
[Sprinkle some salt]
[Perfect timing]
Let's cut it
I usually don't eat the shoulder meat
I like it from here because it's good
Looks yummy
Come to think of it, I didn't even touch the soybean soup
That's good
[Owner gets her a drink]
Excuse me, what's this?

That's the cheek and that's the neck
A lot of young people have been coming here after you came here
This street? After I opened the restaurant? Yes
There weren't many young people around
A lot of youngsters now come to this neighborhood for your restaurant
It's really nice
Thank you
It looks like pork jowl
Let's hurry and eat
I think the best items here are the pork belly and the shoulder meat
Thinly sliced is good too
Oh no! It won't be as good if it's too cooked
I didn't know because it wasn't loud enough
I couldn't hear it getting cooked
Let's try the cheek meat
It's very similar to the pork jowl

[3-second rule]
I can easily eat 5kgs of meat from here
The neck meat now
The texture is different
Every meat has its own texture
Let's move these out
[Speechless]
Mountain of meat
So yummy
Let's grill the rest
Let's cook the kimchi too It's so good
Thank you!
It's an automatic refill?
Thank you
I will pay for these
Automatic refills

More usage of chopsticks if the pieces are small
So it makes it feel like you're eating more food
Let's stab these
How did I even cut these into pieces?
This is as if I boiled it in grease
Kimchi!
Really hot
I've gotten used to grilling and eating KBBQ alone
I'm the master of eating alone
I will end the mukbang here
Thanks everyone
Bill, please
You need to pay? Of course I do!
Please include the sodas too
Thank you
Tzuyang! I'm a fan

Thank you
I am too
Hello everyone
My videos will now be playing in buses mainly in bigger cities like Seoul
This is all thanks to my fans and subscribers that made this possible
There it is!
The screen is much bigger than I thought
I can even see it from here
I'm a bit embarrassed
My videos will be playing just like that
I heard that there are benefits too
Go on the bus app
Look up the station
Go into the bus stations
You can check when the buses will be arriving
And also for an event,

Click the QR code
[Scan the QR code from Tzuyang's mukbang]
If you don't get it on your way to work, try it on your way back home
Thank you for watching my videos even on the bus
I hope that you also win prizes from the event
[Happy commuting]
[With the interest and love from my subscribers, my videos will be playing in the metropolitan area and Seoul city buses. Thank you very much to those who always watch my videos. Don't catch a change-of-season sickness!] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
